title: IdentifiedBehavior
description: A single testable behavior identified by AI-driven behavior analysis. The 'technique' field is new in spec 037 and is optional for backward compatibility with legacy AI responses.

category.description: One of the configured analysis categories (e.g., happy_path, boundary, negative). Free-form to allow custom categories.

title.description: Short human-readable description of the behavior.

source.description: Path of the source document the behavior was derived from.

technique.description: ISTQB test design technique that produced this behavior. Empty string for legacy responses or behaviors without a clear technique mapping.
